title: Dennis Painting Backport
body:
#

this is a really simple datapack/mod that ports the Dennis Painting from 1.21.7 to older versions, this project will no longer be updated to newer versions as the painting is now in vanilla :3

# ![Good Boi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/819168faa855c160c7d1efd60e1c4d63143a837c.png) #

Before You Ask

**

Q: Can i use this project in my published modpacks?

**

A: of course, you can do this with any of my projects aslong as the download stays hosted within the modrinth ecosystem :3

**

Q: How do i use this pack?

**

A: so, the file you have is both the datapack, and the resource pack! basically, add the same file to both the datapack folder in your world and your recource pack folder :D (this is so simple lol)
